reviews.comment:
Muy buen alojamiento,muy ordenado y limpio. Personal extremadamente atento. buena relacion precio y servicio. Estacionamiento cubierto y vigilado. Muy bueno el restaurante. La ubicación es excelente para los viajeros de paso que no quieran entrar a Bahia Blanca.

(Translated by Google)
Very good accommodation, very tidy and clean. Extremely attentive staff. Good value for money. Covered and secure parking. The restaurant is very good. The location is excellent for travelers passing through who don't want to go into Bahia Blanca.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbDRtNnlBRRAB
